_meta.description: Regression gold standard — verified expected values for known carriers. Only fields present in a carrier's record are checked; absent fields are skipped. A wrong expected value is worse than none — only lock values verified against SAFER.

204814._notes: Fully verified against SAFER Jun 22 2026. Private property carrier, no MC#, no FMCSA authority or insurance filing required.

3431540._notes: Audit flagged: report showed 12 inspections, SMS shows ~9. Inspection count inflated — likely dedup issue. Add full expected values after dedup fix verified.

3612954._notes: Audit flagged: active+revoked contradiction and no-record-to-no-insurance error. Must pass validation rules 1, 6, 7 after rebuild. Expected values TBD — verify against SAFER before locking.

3841767._notes: Audit flagged: summary showed INACTIVE while body showed ACTIVE (rules 8, 9 conflict). Must not produce contradictory status across sections after rebuild.

623336._notes: Audit flagged: revoked vs active conflict. Verify against SAFER and lock expected values once resolved.

3012101._notes: Private carrier, 1 truck / 1 driver. Verified from audit notes Jun 22 2026. Must pass rules 2 and 3 (private+authority_required=NO, private+insurance_required=NO).

1612145._notes: Private property carrier, 1 truck / 1 driver. Verified from audit notes Jun 22 2026.

2308088._notes: Audit flagged: report showed 'for-hire' wording but carrier appears to be service/intrastate (rule 19). Correct carrier_type TBD — verify against SAFER before locking.

2051387._notes: Confirmed against SAFER Jul 1 2026. SAFER shows Private(Property), NOT AUTHORIZED, blank MC field. Our DB has MC940282 (import artifact) and cargo_type=PRIVATE PROPERTY. After Bug 1 fix, cargo_type must win over MC presence.

888283._name: PUBLIC SERVICE COMPANY OF NORTH CAROLINA INCORPORATED
888283._notes: Reported by auditor Jul 1 2026 as Private misclassified as FOR_HIRE. cargo_type=PRIVATE PROPERTY in our DB. After Bug 1 fix must classify as PRIVATE.
888283.legal_name: PUBLIC SERVICE COMPANY OF NORTH CAROLINA INCORPORATED

830598._notes: Pending SAFER verification (prev session). FOR_HIRE with repeated annual revocation/reinstatement cycles — all authority_history revocations show reason=DISCONTINUED REVOCATION; alert at 2024-01-29 lacks DISCONTIN flag. REINSTATED 2024-06-17. After Bug 2 fix: CONFIRMED_ACTIVE, revocation_date=None, rule 01 PASS.

833248._notes: Pending SAFER verification (prev session). FOR_HIRE with repeated revocation/reinstatement cycles. Alerts lack DISCONTIN flag but authority_history shows reinstatements after each. After Bug 2 fix: CONFIRMED_ACTIVE, revocation_date=None, rule 01 PASS.

2383948._notes: Confirmed SAFER Jul 1 2026. Operation classification shows BOTH Auth. For Hire AND Private(Property). MC-819002. Currently AUTHORIZED. cargo_type in DB: 'PRIVATE PROPERTY;AUTHORIZED FOR HIRE'. Must classify as MIXED_OPERATION (not PRIVATE). Round 2 audit fix.

3036633._notes: High-confidence MIXED_OPERATION match — same pattern as CASTELLI (cargo_type has both PRIVATE PROPERTY and AUTHORIZED FOR HIRE, MC number present, authority records present). Round 2 audit fix.

2675124._notes: cargo_type='AUTHORIZED FOR HIRE' but no MC number and no authority_history records. Operating under state authority only. Must classify as INTRASTATE_ONLY, not PRIVATE. Round 2 audit fix.

1074419._notes: Bug 2 verification DOT (batch 02). FOR_HIRE with reinstatement pattern — CONFIRMED_ACTIVE, revocation_date=None. Verified Jul 1 2026.

31047._notes: Round 3 audit fix. Socrata carrier_operation='C' (Intrastate Non-HM). cargo_type='AUTHORIZED FOR HIRE' + MC108103 (inactive). carrier_operation overrides MC presence — must classify as FOR_HIRE_INTRASTATE_ONLY, not FOR_HIRE_INTERSTATE.

810652._notes: Round 3 audit fix. Socrata carrier_operation='C' (Intrastate Non-HM). cargo_type='EXEMPT FOR HIRE' + MC459374 (inactive). Must classify as EXEMPT_FOR_HIRE_INTRASTATE_ONLY.

973209._notes: Round 3 — confirm still correctly classified. Socrata carrier_operation='C' (Intrastate Non-HM). cargo_type='PRIVATE PROPERTY', no MC. Classification moves from PRIVATE to PRIVATE_PROPERTY_INTRASTATE_NON_HM.

4275752._notes: Round 3 audit fix. Socrata carrier_operation='B' (Intrastate HM), hm_ind='Y'. cargo_type='PRIVATE PROPERTY', no MC. Must classify as PRIVATE_PROPERTY_INTRASTATE_HM with HM notice in report.

3128165._notes: Round 3 fleet fix. Socrata: truck_units=0, total_cars=1, power_units=1. DB total_trucks corrected to 0. non_cmv_units=1. carrier_operation='A' (Interstate) — stays FOR_HIRE_INTERSTATE. fleet_power_units=0 + fleet_drivers=1 will trigger Rule 16 asymmetry conflict (expected — carrier has car not truck).

1864365._notes: Round 3 passenger flag. Socrata: crgo_passengers='X', carrier_operation='A' (Interstate). cargo_type='PRIVATE PROPERTY' — stays PRIVATE. has_passenger_cargo=True → passenger verification notice appears in report.

2833702._notes: Regression: must stay MIXED_OPERATION across all rounds. Socrata carrier_operation='A' (Interstate). cargo_type='PRIVATE PROPERTY;AUTHORIZED FOR HIRE', MC947611 active. Verified Jul 1 2026.
